name: EnvironmentVariables
summary: This collector returns information about system environment variables, current user, and volatile and process variables.

fields.name: username
fields.description: The owner of the process that is running on the environment where this variable is set.

fields.name: process_id
fields.description: ID given by operating system to the process.

examples.title: Example: Show the PATH environment variable set on device 192.168.0.5
examples.v2_query: EnvironmentVariables where EnvironmentVariables name equals "PATH" and HostInfo ip_address equals 192.168.0.5
